description:
A tiny snipping tool that uploads region screenshots and copies the URL to the clipboard.

RagSnip captures a region of the screen using the built-in Windows
Snip & Sketch overlay, uploads it to your choice of catbox.moe, 0x0.st,
or Imgur, and puts the resulting URL on your clipboard. The persistent
GUI keeps a thumbnail history of recent snips — left-click any row
to re-copy the URL, right-click for a menu (Copy URL / Copy image /
Open in browser).
